overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a vibrant futuristic city plaza. The character descends from an elevated walkway into a bustling pedestrian area with towering skyscrapers, neon advertisements, and flying vehicles overhead, eventually descending into a darker underpass beneath a red bridge structure.

events.description: descending concrete stairs from elevated walkway into open plaza level

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs into the plaza while observing the futuristic cityscape and digital billboards ahead

entered.detail: distinctive turquoise spherical structure with horizontal rings on the right side
large elevated highway structure spanning across the background with vehicles
massive digital screen displaying advertisements on distant building
wide concrete stairs descending into the plaza area

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the top of stairs next to a distinctive turquoise spherical building. The camera descends into a sunlit futuristic plaza with towering skyscrapers and massive digital billboards visible in the distance. The environment is bright and open with clear blue skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with trees and benches

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead in the distance above the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the sunlit plaza among scattered pedestrians and landscaped trees

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in colorful athletic wear walking across the plaza

entered.detail: mature trees with green foliage planted throughout the plaza
concrete and metal benches arranged around the plaza
futuristic hovering car flying through the sky above the city

segments.scene_description: Walking through the open plaza surrounded by trees and benches. The camera moves past various pedestrians while a flying vehicle hovers in the distant sky. The turquoise building and entrance stairs fall behind as the digital billboards shift to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza edge with food stalls approaching underpass entrance

events.description: approaching cylindrical kiosk building and food cart area

agents.ego_description: walking past food vendors and a cylindrical kiosk building while approaching a red bridge structure

notable_agents.action: vendor standing beside food cart with umbrella

entered.detail: round cylindrical structure with glass windows and neon 'OPEN' sign
street food cart with colorful umbrella and vendor
bright red elevated walkway bridge spanning over the lower level
tall vertical digital signage with purple and pink neon colors

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the edge of the plaza past a cylindrical kiosk building and food carts. A prominent red pedestrian bridge becomes visible ahead spanning over a lower level. The environment remains bright but buildings begin to enclose the space slightly.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass beneath red bridge with market stalls

events.description: entering darker underpass area beneath the red bridge with artificial neon lighting

agents.ego_description: descending stairs into the darker underpass area beneath the red bridge structure

entered.detail: concrete stairs leading down to the lower underpass level
purple neon signs illuminating the darker underpass area
small market stalls and vendors set up in the covered underpass

segments.scene_description: The camera descends stairs into a darker underpass beneath the red bridge. The lighting shifts dramatically from bright sunlight to dimmer artificial neon illumination. Small market stalls line the sides of the covered walkway as the environment becomes enclosed and sheltered.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open futuristic plaza into a sheltered, dimly lit urban underpass. It begins at the top of a staircase beside a turquoise spherical building, descending into a sunlit expanse defined by towering skyscrapers and massive digital billboards under a clear blue sky. As the camera moves through the plaza past pedestrians and greenery, the open vista shifts, leaving the spherical building behind while a flying vehicle hovers in the distance. The scene then progresses past cylindrical kiosks and food carts as the surrounding architecture begins to enclose the space, bringing a prominent red pedestrian bridge into view. Finally, the camera descends a set of stairs beneath the bridge, where the lighting shifts dramatically from brilliant sunlight to the dim, artificial neon glow of a covered walkway lined with market stalls.
